title: Pluscuamperfecto intro
subtitle: Say had done something before another past event.
overview: It explains what was already true before another event.

items.es: Cuando llegué, Ana ya había salido.
items.en: When I arrived, Ana had already left.

items.es: No pude entrar porque había perdido la llave.
items.en: I could not enter because I had lost the key.

items.es: Nunca había probado esa comida antes.
items.en: I had never tried that food before.

items.es: El tren ya había salido cuando llegamos.
items.en: The train had already left when we arrived.

items.es: Había estudiado mucho, pero estaba nervioso.
items.en: I had studied a lot, but I was nervous.
